case_title: DEBORA BURTON VS. SALVADOR MIGUEL GARZA et al

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATOR PAUL JOHN DION APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION DEC-27-2004 THROUGH MAR-27-2005.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT DECLARATION FO REASONABLE DILIGENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURTON, DEBORA SERVED MAY-12-2004, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GARZA, SALVADOR MIGUEL AKA  MIKE GARZA DBA AC AUTO WRECKERS

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-25-2005 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-01-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CROSS COMPLAINT FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT GARZA, MIKE SUED AS SALVADOR MIKE GARZA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BURTON, DEBORA ROES 1-100

OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURTON, DEBORA AS TO DEFENDANT GARZA, SALVADOR MIGUEL AKA  MIKE GARZA DBA AC AUTO WRECKERS DOES  1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-08-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-06-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-23-2004
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT GARZA, MIKE SUED AS SALVADOR MIKE GARZA
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR LIPTON, ARTHUR CHARLES AS ATTORNEY FOR BURTON, DEBORA BURTON, DEBORA

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-15-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE A CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT PRIOR TO THE CASE MANAGEMENT. THE OCT-08-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR DEC-13-2004. NOV-15-2004 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUL-01-2005 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. APR-25-2005 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. THAT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF(S), DEBORA BURTON IS DENIED. THAT CLAIM OF CROSS-COMPLAINANT MIKE GARZA IS DENIED. STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE: AWARDED TO DEFENDANT(S), SALVADOR MIGUEL GARZA, AKA MIKE GARZA-SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ANSWER TO CROSS COMPLAINT FILED BY CROSS DEFENDANT BURTON, DEBORA
